title: SoroSuub Landing
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Location |image=[[File:SoroSuubLanding.jpg]] |name=SoroSuub Landing |created= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Lower City]], [[Taris/Legends|Taris]][[Knights of the Old Republic 2|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2]] |terrain= |fauna= |flora= |interest=[[Kedorzhan pub]] |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Can— can you hear what they're saying?''"
"''No—but the crawl's in Sullustese. We must be in SoroSuub Landing.|Zayne Carrick and Marn Hierogryph|}} '''SoroSuub Landing''' was an area of the [[Lower City]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] that was home to a sizable [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] and [[Kedorzhan]] population—the Kedorzhans often worked in nearby [[Mining/Legends|mines]]. SoroSuub Landing had at least one [[Kedorzhan pub|bar]] tailored for Kedorzhan miners. In [[3963 BBY]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], in the midst of their [[Taris Siege|invasion]] of Taris, conducted operations from SoroSuub Landing. ==Description== SoroSuub Landing was an area of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]' [[Lower City]]. Located below the more lucrative communities of the [[Upper City]], SoroSuub Landing had a heavy [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] population—at least one of the major public [[Viewscreen/Legends|viewscreens]] in SoroSuub Landing, which shared information such as descriptions of fugitives, had a text crawl in [[Sullustese/Legends|Sullustese]]. SoroSuub Landing also had a considerable [[Kedorzhan]] population, many of whom worked in nearby [[Mining/Legends|mines]]. After their shifts, Kedorzhan miners often spent [[Time/Legends|time]] in a [[Kedorzhan pub|bar]] in SoroSuub Landing catering to a Kedorzhan clientele. SoroSuub Landing shares its name with the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]].''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' ==History== {{Quote|This is Sornell, for the team at SoroSuub Landing, or whatever they call it. See if you can get that big viewscreen down without totally trashing the electronics. I'd like to have just one piece of equipment this trip I don't have to build myself, for a change.|Koblus Sornell|{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/interference20090929.html|text="Interference"|int=Interference|newhost=Suvudu}}}} In [[3964 BBY]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zayne Carrick]] was accused of [[Padawan Massacre|murdering]] four of his fellow classmates in the Upper City's [[Jedi Tower]]. Carrick evaded Jedi pursuit with local [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvian]] hood [[Marn Hierogryph]] and ended up in SoroSuub Landing. It was on a nearby viewscreen that Carrick and Hierogryph first found that they were being pursued by all the [[Taris Civil Authority|forces]] of Taris law enforcement, and, looking for somewhere to quietly hide, the pair slipped into a Kedorzhan bar. During the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Taris Siege|siege]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] in [[3963 BBY]], Mandalorian warrior [[Koblus Sornell]] led a team in SoroSuub Landing. There, they tried to bring down a large viewscreen for their own use. ==Behind the scenes== SoroSuub Landing made its first appearance in [[Knights of the Old Republic 2|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[John Jackson Miller]], illustrated by [[Brian Ching]], and released on [[February 22]], [[2006]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-858/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-2|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #2}} ==Appearances== *[[Knights of the Old Republic 2|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 2]] {{1st}} *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/interference20090929.html|text="Interference"|int=Interference|newhost=Suvudu}} {{1stID|SoroSuub Landing}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=SoroSuub-Frachthafen |es=Zona SoroSuub }} [[Category:Lower City locations]]
